final_prompt.prompt:
Create an e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for LUMEA BEAUTY, a feminine Japanese skincare brand, designed for high-conversion beauty commerce.

Style/medium: clean modern e-commerce UI design with airy, feminine sensibility, floral accents featuring purple flowers, soft and approachable
Composition: hero section with three-column layout — left column for headline and features, center for model with product, right column for product display and stat cards, bottom benefit cards spanning full width
Subject: left column contains headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", subheadline about concentrated moisturizing serum for dry dull skin, three pill-shaped feature badges with icons (敏感肌OK, 高保湿, 朝晩使える), three bullet points with pink checkmarks (美容成分をしっかり届ける, ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ, 続けやすいシンプルケア), two CTA buttons (初回限定で試してみる >, 成分をチェック >), trust badges (送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし); center shows young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek while holding dropper bottle of serum; right column shows two products (moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle, packaging box) with three floating stat cards (満足度 96%, 美容成分 5種配合, 愛用者 12,000人突破); bottom shows three horizontal benefit cards (うるおい, 透明感, 使いやすさ)
Scene/backdrop: clean bright airy background with soft floral accents and purple flowers scattered subtly
Lighting/mood: soft diffused lighting creating gentle warmth and trust
Color palette: soft pink and white as primary colors, purple floral accents, gold accents on stat cards
Materials/textures: smooth product surfaces, matte pill badges, floating white rounded rectangles with subtle shadows
Text (verbatim): LUMEA BEAUTY, 特徴, 成分, お客様の声, 使い方, FAQ, 今すぐ試す, 鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。, 乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。, 敏感肌OK, 高保湿, 朝晩使える, 美容成分をしっかり届ける, ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ, 続けやすいシンプルケア, 初回限定で試してみる >, 成分をチェック >, 送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし, 満足度 96%, 美容成分 5種配合, 愛用者 12,000人突破, うるおい, 透明感, 使いやすさ
Constraints: all Japanese text must be legible, clear visual hierarchy from headline to CTAs, feminine but professional beauty brand aesthetic, high conversion layout principles
Avoid: cluttered information hierarchy, illegible small Japanese text, harsh shadows, overly decorative elements that distract from conversion goal
